projects.title: Quest Log — Task Manager
projects.description: A gamified task management app where completing tasks earns XP and levels up your productivity character. Built with vanilla JavaScript and local storage.

projects.title: Pixel Forge — CSS Art Studio
projects.description: An interactive CSS art playground featuring a real-time preview panel, color palette generator, and export-to-snippet functionality.

projects.title: Starlight API — Weather Visualizer
projects.description: A weather dashboard that transforms forecast data into animated celestial visualizations — sun, stars, and cloud cover mapped to conditions.

projects.title: Dungeon Debugger — Error Logger
projects.description: A playful error-monitoring dashboard styled as a dungeon map. Each bug is a monster to slay; squashing them clears the dungeon floor by floor.

projects.title: Echo — Terminal Portfolio
projects.description: A retro terminal-themed portfolio with command-style navigation, ASCII art headers, and typewriter animations for a nostalgic dev experience.

projects.title: Constellation — Social Links Hub
projects.description: A visually rich link-in-bio page built around a constellation theme, where each social link glows like a connected star in the night sky.
